name: Chicken Tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim any fat from the chicken and cut into cubes or thin slices.
2. In a medium-size bowl, combine the soy sauce, water, lemon juice, and chicken; marinate for 15 minutes.
3. Heat the sesame oil in a non-stick pan or wok over medium heat.
4. Cook the garlic for 1 minute until fragrant.
5. Add the chicken to the pan and stir-fry until cooked through on all sides.
6. Sprinkle the tarragon and pepper over the chicken; stir to combine.
7. Serve with "Orzo and Pignoli" and "Minted Tomato Saute".
Food Exchange per serving: 4 LOW-FAT MEAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 164; CHO: 72mg; CAR: 72g; PRO: 27g; SOD: 368mg; FAT: 4g.
